title: Breaking Out of the False World
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Robin, Unknown person #9, Vegapunk as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What're you smirking about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Isn't it hard not to smile?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's so dedicated to UFFY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey, Boss, Mind Stepping out the way?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We still gotta teach 'em a lesson!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ON THIS DAY, BY GARTEL ISLAND...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The Barto Club pirate ship was sunk.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is unknown if there are any survivors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HACHINOSU - "PIRATE ISLAND"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How the hell did ya let this happen, Pizarre??!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I haven't even been gone that long!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's not that simple, nyaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn'Tcha Hear?! The world is on the brink!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: The PoneGlyphs ain't an obscure secret anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We emperors are gonna hafta tear each other to pieces over them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think the government and Navy are just gonna stand-by?! We ain't gonna win unless we're ready!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kobby was our age in the hole, and you're tellin' me he got away?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm sowny, sowny, teach!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Just hear meow-ut!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It ain't like I just let him scurry away...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Where does this shop go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And you let Moria escape, too?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: to the left!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Watch your ass!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: COMMO- DORE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We're ready for anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Everyone knows you're the man...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: ...who'll claim the one piece, blackbeard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one who's gonna take over the world!!

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
